docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION DISMISSAL & PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ENO

LAW AND MOTION, 301, ENO JACKSON'S MOTION FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (CCP2033K), OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY APPELLANT SEE 3 EYE LLC AS TO RESPONDENT JACKSON, ENO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) LABOR APPEAR COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-23-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (CCP2033K), PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ENO HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY RESPONDENT JACKSON, ENO
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT SEE 3 EYE LLC
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ENO
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-19-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-23-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE ELAN WICK.

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER, REPORTER-BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PARTIES ARE PRESENT IN COURT AND AFTER SOME DISCUSSION WITH THE COURT PRESENT THEIR RESPECTIVE CASES. PARTIES STIPULATE TO SOME TERMS ON THE RECORD, AND MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ENO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEE 3 EYE LLC $5,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $7,756.80 MANDATORY WAITING TIME PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,756.80, REGULAR WAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $183.11 AND INTEREST ON UNPAID WAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.30 PER DAY FROM DECEMBER 19, 2000, UNTIL THE AWARD IS PAID IN FULL. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
